welcome.title: SciPen Studio
welcome.subtitle: Local Research, Cloud Intelligence
welcome.description: AI-powered research paper writing assistant for more efficient and professional academic writing
welcome.noRecentProjectsHint: Open a project to get started
welcome.proTipDesc: Select text and press {{shortcut}} to invoke AI polishing for more refined academic writing.
welcome.useInElectron: Please use this feature in Electron app

remoteDialog.title: Open Remote Project
remoteDialog.subtitle: Connect to Overleaf and select a project

remoteDialog.serverUrlHint: Supports official server or private deployment
remoteDialog.cookieStep1: Log in to Overleaf in your browser
remoteDialog.cookieStep2: Press F12 to open Developer Tools
remoteDialog.cookieExpired: Cookie may have expired, please reconfigure.

editor.selectFileHint: Select a file from the left file tree to start editing
editor.remoteCancelNotSupported: Remote compilation does not support cancellation

inlineEdit.placeholder: Ask AI to edit selection — Enter to submit, Esc to cancel
inlineEdit.acceptHint: Tab to accept · Esc to cancel

settings.title: Settings
settings.agentRuntimeSnacaDesc: Embeds a snaca-editor subprocess. Requires SNACA_API_KEY env.
settings.agentRuntimeBuiltinDesc: Calls the AI service directly (completion-only path).

overleaf.title: Overleaf
overleaf.conflictQuestion:
"{{fileName}}" was modified on both local and Overleaf.

Keep local version and overwrite Overleaf?

aiSettings.chatModelDesc: Pick a stronger reasoning model, e.g. deepseek-chat, claude-sonnet-4
aiSettings.providerDesc: Select the model provider for AI
aiSettings.baseUrlDesc: API endpoint URL, leave empty for default
aiSettings.modelDesc: Model ID for Ctrl+K inline completion (low-latency models recommended, e.g. gpt-4o-mini); leave blank to reuse the Primary Agent Model

compiler.title: LaTeX Compilation Settings
compiler.remoteProject: Currently a remote project (Overleaf), using remote compilation
compiler.localProject: Currently a local project, using local compilation
compiler.engineDesc: Use XeLaTeX or LuaLaTeX for Chinese documents
compiler.noProjectHint: Please open a project first, compilation settings will adjust automatically based on project type:
compiler.localProjectOptions: Local project: Choose from XeLaTeX, LuaLaTeX, pdfLaTeX, Tectonic
compiler.remoteProjectOptions: Remote project (Overleaf): Use Overleaf remote compilation

overleaf.title: Overleaf Remote Compilation
overleaf.desc: Use Overleaf server for remote compilation, supports SyncTeX bidirectional sync
overleaf.serverUrlDesc: Supports official server or private deployment
overleaf.cookiesDesc: Copy from browser Developer Tools (F12) → Application → Cookies
overleaf.step1: Login to Overleaf in browser and open project
overleaf.step2: Press F12 to open Developer Tools

compiler.texliveEndpointDesc: URL for on-demand TeX package/font fetching during WASM compilation. Defaults to the BusyTeX upstream endpoint; replace with http://your-host:5001/ for self-hosted, leave empty to disable remote fallback.
compiler.typstEngineDesc: Select the compiler backend used for Typst PDF generation; options shown depend on what is detected on this machine
compiler.typstNoEngine: No Typst compiler detected. Install tinymist/typst CLI or run pnpm download:typst-wasm to enable the Typst engine.
compiler.typstEngineMissing: Selected engine "{{engine}}" is unavailable. Please choose another engine.
compiler.typstFontEndpointDesc: The Typst engine ships with a full font set (Libertinus + NewCM + DejaVu + Noto CJK SC). To layer extra fonts (TC/JP/KR or custom families) set a manifest URL — the engine fetches it at init and Electron disk-caches the binaries. See scipen-wasm://typst-ts/examples/noto-cjk-sc.json for the manifest format.
compiler.typstFontHintNotConfigured: Hint: the local font set doesn't include the requested font. Set a manifest URL under "Settings → Typst Font Supplement" that contains it — the Typst engine will pull it on next init.
compiler.typstFontHintConfigured: Hint: a font supplement URL is configured but doesn't provide the requested font. Edit that manifest to include the font, or switch to one that's already available.
compiler.typstFontHintFetchFailed: Hint: the font supplement URL is unreachable; the Typst engine loaded local fonts only. Check the URL and your network, then restart Studio.
compiler.syncTexLocalSupport: pdfLaTeX, XeLaTeX, LuaLaTeX, and Tectonic support SyncTeX.
compiler.syncTexWasmSupport: LaTeX WASM engines (pdftex / xetex / lualatex) have session-scoped SyncTeX support.
compiler.syncTexTypstSupport: No Typst engine currently supports SyncTeX; source/PDF bidirectional jump is unavailable.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Click on a shortcut and press a new key combination to modify

selectionSettings.title: Selection Assistant
selectionSettings.subtitle: Review captured text from any application
selectionSettings.enableSelectionDesc: When enabled, use a shortcut or global selection popup to inspect captured text
selectionSettings.triggerShortcutDesc: After selecting text in any app, press this shortcut to open the selection window
selectionSettings.triggerModeDesc: Shortcut trigger is more stable, global selection provides smoother experience
selectionSettings.platformNotSupported: Current platform does not support global selection hook (Windows/macOS only)
selectionSettings.step3: Review the captured text and continue in SciPen if needed

logPanel.title: Log
logPanel.noLogs: No logs yet, compile document to see logs here

commandPalette.openAIDesc: Chat with AI assistant for help
commandPalette.compileDocDesc: Compile current LaTeX document to PDF

history.createLabelDesc: Capture a named version snapshot of every currently open file
history.browseLabelsDesc: Inspect this project's snapshots; restore any version
history.labelEmpty: No snapshots yet — use "Create snapshot label" to start
history.labelNoFiles: No open files to snapshot — open a file first
history.restoreConfirm: Restore to "{{name}}"? Every currently open file will be replaced with the snapshot's version (you can undo with Ctrl+Z).
history.rollbackBeforeConfirm: Restore every open file to the state right before this message?
history.rollbackNoStep: No snapshot exists prior to this message

chat.approvalShortcutHint: A allow · D deny · Shift+A to always allow
chat.questionShortcutHint: Ctrl+Enter to submit · Esc to skip
chat.welcomeTitle: Ask AI anything about this document
chat.examplePrompt1: Outline this document's structure and logic
chat.examplePrompt2: Check grammar, word choice and phrasing
chat.examplePrompt3: What are the weak points in this section's argument?
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask anything (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline, @ to reference files)

needsConfig.title: No AI model configured yet
needsConfig.desc: Add your model service API key and model name in Settings to start chatting — this panel reconnects automatically once you're done.

chat.compileErrorAsk: Help me figure out how to fix it.

fileConflict.deletedDesc: This file has been deleted from disk.
fileConflict.modifiedDesc: This file has been modified in an external editor.
fileConflict.unsavedWillLose: You have unsaved changes, reloading will lose these changes.
fileConflict.reloadQuestion: Do you want to reload the latest content?

settingsPanel.title: Settings Panel
settingsPanel.description: These changes apply to the current workspace immediately.

summaries.compiler: Manage LaTeX, Typst, and workspace compilation behavior.
summaries.editor: Tune fonts, completion, and day-to-day editing experience.

summaries.shortcuts: Customize command shortcuts and interaction habits.
summaries.selection: Configure selection assistant and shortcut trigger mode.
summaries.ai: Configure provider, API key, and models for AI Services and inline completion.
summaries.agent: Browse Agent memory and the skills available to this project.
summaries.zotero: Enable Zotero integration to @cite any reference from the editor.
summaries.update: Check for and install application updates.

zoteroPaper.empty: Ctrl+Click a citation to view its PDF
zoteroPaper.mdUnavailable: Not parsed yet — click "Precise parse" first
zoteroPaper.qualityPoor: Local extraction looks poor (scanned pages or dense formulas) — AI may misread it

dialog.title: Configure MinerU Precise Parse
dialog.privacyBody: Precise parse uploads this PDF to the MinerU third-party cloud service for parsing. Please confirm you accept this.
dialog.consent: I understand and agree to upload the PDF to MinerU cloud parsing

zoteroEmbedding.toggleDesc: On a pause, surface papers you might cite in the status bar based on the current paragraph, and also improve @cite completion ordering (off by default)

dialog.title: Set up embedding recommendations
dialog.privacyBody: Recommendations send the paragraph you are editing to the chosen embedding provider for vectorization. Please confirm you accept this.
dialog.keyPlaceholder: Paste the API key for the chosen provider
dialog.consent: I understand and agree to send paragraph text to the chosen embedding provider

zoteroRecommend.noKey: Configure embedding in Settings to enable suggestions

zoteroRecommend.empty: Keep writing — related papers will surface here

agentStatus.usageHint: Cumulative tokens / estimated cost for this conversation

settingsAgent.memoryDesc: Project-scoped long-term memory: user prefs, project conventions, references, and feedback corrections.
settingsAgent.skillsDesc: Project- and tenant-scoped skill library. Edit the .md files in your editor.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.desc: Configure Model Context Protocol servers so the LLM can call external tools (filesystem, databases, APIs, ...). Tools land as mcp__<server>__<tool> and auto-register with the Agent.
mcp.name: Name
mcp.nameDuplicate: Duplicate name; SNACA will keep the first and drop the rest
mcp.commandDesc: Executable or PATH-resolvable command (npx / uvx / python / ...).
mcp.urlDesc: Remote Streamable HTTP endpoint of the MCP server.
mcp.restartHint: ⚠ MCP config changes restart the sidecar; the active session resumes automatically.

approval.modeDesc: Takes effect on the next turn — no session restart needed.

webSearch.apiKeyDesc: Saving restarts the Agent runtime so it takes effect. Leave empty to disable WebSearch (WebFetch still works).

engine.title: Engine advanced
engine.desc: Override SNACA engine defaults. Leave blank to keep the model-aware default. Changes restart the sidecar.
engine.maxIterationsDesc: Max LLM iterations per turn — prevents runaway loops.
engine.loopGuardDesc: Abort after N consecutive identical tool-call patterns (anti-loop heuristic).
engine.historyLimitDesc: Cap on history messages injected per turn.
engine.concurrentToolsDesc: Max concurrent tool calls within one turn.
engine.compactAfterDesc: Trigger auto-compaction once input tokens cross this threshold.
engine.compactSummaryMaxTokensDesc: Cap on the summariser LLM's output during compaction (default 2048).
engine.historyMaxBytesDesc: Hard byte cap on assembled history (default ~1.5MB).
engine.turnTimeoutSecsDesc: Wall-clock cap per turn in seconds. 0 disables.
engine.collapseToolResultsThresholdDesc: Collapse historical read-only tool results larger than N bytes. 0 disables.
engine.maxOutputTokenEscalationAttemptsDesc: Retries when the LLM hits max_tokens mid-stream. 0 disables escalation.
engine.maxOutputTokenCeilingDesc: Upper bound for the escalation loop's max_tokens (default 32768).
engine.streamToolExecutionDesc: Stream tool execution output back to the UI.
engine.memoryExtractorDesc: After every turn, run an LLM pass that proposes new memory entries and writes them to MEMORY.md (one extra LLM call per turn). When off, memories are only saved when the LLM explicitly invokes the memory_write tool in-turn.
engine.memoryExtractorModelDesc: Model used for the post-turn extractor. Leave blank to reuse the main chat model. Only active when memory_extractor is on.
engine.mcpIdleTtlSecsDesc: Seconds before an idle MCP subprocess is reclaimed. 0 = keep alive forever.
engine.mcpReaperPeriodSecsDesc: How often the reaper sweeps idle MCP subprocesses (seconds). 0 disables sweeping.

memoryViewer.title: Memory & Skills
memoryViewer.noActiveSession: Not connected to a project. Open a project first.
memoryViewer.previewPlaceholder: Select an entry on the left to view

zoteroWizard.title: Connect Zotero
zoteroWizard.subtitle: Finish 3 quick steps and @cite any paper in the editor

step1.title: Is Zotero installed?
step1.missingHint: Zotero is the open-source reference manager. Deep integration requires it.

step2.title: Is Local API enabled?
step2.missingHint: Zotero → Settings → Advanced → enable "Allow other applications on this computer to communicate with Zotero"

step3.title: Install Better BibTeX? (Strongly recommended)
step3.okHint: Human-readable citation keys are available (e.g., smith2024deep)
step3.missingHint: BBT gives readable citation keys; skipping still works but falls back to 8-char Zotero codes (e.g., 8FXYZ123)
step3.skipNoteHint: Citation keys fall back to itemKeys — all features work but readability drops

zoteroSettings.title: Zotero integration
zoteroSettings.subtitle: Enables a long-running main-process index of your Zotero library; @cite from the editor
zoteroSettings.enableIntegrationDesc: First enable opens the setup wizard; the main process then indexes your library
zoteroSettings.notEnabledDesc: Zotero integration relies on a local Zotero install + Local API. Three quick steps and you can @cite any reference from the editor.
zoteroSettings.refreshNowDesc: Reload all items from Zotero and merge BBT citation keys
zoteroSettings.reopenWizardDesc: Re-run the 3-step setup after a Zotero/BBT install change
zoteroSettings.redetectDesc: Useful only after manually moving your Zotero install path

bibtexSync.title: references.bib auto-sync
bibtexSync.description: Export the Zotero library as a BibTeX file under the project root so LaTeX/biber can resolve every \cite{}
bibtexSync.enableDesc: Re-writes the .bib file within 500ms of any Zotero change; skips when the file has been externally modified
bibtexSync.fileNameDesc: BibTeX file generated under the project root; defaults to references.bib
bibtexSync.translatorDesc: BetterBibLaTeX is modern + UTF-8 friendly (recommended); BibTeX is classic for legacy projects
bibtexSync.hintTitle: Add this line to your main .tex file so LaTeX compilation can resolve \cite{} references:
bibtexSync.hintDesc: .scipen/ is auto-added to .gitignore; the file is sync-only — do not hand-edit

status.conflict: Conflict: .bib was modified externally; sync paused
